testcase.name: Verify Car Insurance heading is present
testcase.classname: NV_US01_TC01 Navigate to Car Insurance page and verify heading
testcase.system-out: @NV_US01_TC01 &amp#27;[1mScenario:&amp#27;[22m Verify Car Insurance heading is present &amp#27;[90m# features/NV_US01_TC01_Verify_Car_Insurance_Heading.feature:5&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32mâœ”&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mGiven &amp#27;[22mI launch the browser and open InsuranceDekho application&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.VerifyCarInsuranceHeading.i_launch_the_browser_and_open_insurance_dekho_application()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32mâœ”&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22mI verify InsuranceDekho is visible on the homepage&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.VerifyCarInsuranceHeading.i_verify_insurance_dekho_is_visible_on_the_homepage()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32mâœ”&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22mI hover on Insurance menu&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.VerifyCarInsuranceHeading.i_hover_on_insurance_menu()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32mâœ”&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mI click on Car Insurance&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.VerifyCarInsuranceHeading.i_click_on_car_insurance()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32mâœ”&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22mI verify Car Insurance heading is present&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.VerifyCarInsuranceHeading.i_verify_car_insurance_heading_is_present()&amp#27;[39m
testcase.system-err: Apr 09, 2026 5:33:06 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find an exact match for CDP version 147, returning the closest version; found: 145; Please update to a Selenium version that supports CDP version 147

testcase.name: Calculate Car IDV and validate amount is displayed
testcase.classname: NV_US01_TC02 Calculate Car IDV via Add-on Cover and verify amount
testcase.system-out: @NV_US01_TC02 &amp#27;[1mScenario:&amp#27;[22m Calculate Car IDV and validate amount is displayed &amp#27;[90m# features/NV_US01_TC02_Calculate_Car_IDV.feature:4&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32mâœ”&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mGiven &amp#27;[22mI launch the browser and open InsuranceDekho application&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.VerifyCarInsuranceHeading.i_launch_the_browser_and_open_insurance_dekho_application()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32mâœ”&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22mI hover on Insurance menu&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.VerifyCarInsuranceHeading.i_hover_on_insurance_menu()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32mâœ”&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mI hover on Car Insurance menu&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.VerifyAndCalculateCarIdv.i_hover_on_car_insurance_menu()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32mâœ”&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mI click on Add On Cover&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.VerifyAndCalculateCarIdv.i_click_on_add_on_cover()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32mâœ”&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mI scroll to Calculate your Car IDV section&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.VerifyAndCalculateCarIdv.i_scroll_to_calculate_your_car_idv_section()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32mâœ”&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mI select first brand&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.VerifyAndCalculateCarIdv.i_select_first_brand()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32mâœ”&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mI select first model&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.VerifyAndCalculateCarIdv.i_select_first_model()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32mâœ”&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mI select first year&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.VerifyAndCalculateCarIdv.i_select_first_year()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32mâœ”&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mI click Calculate Amount&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.VerifyAndCalculateCarIdv.i_click_calculate_amount()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32mâœ”&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22mI verify IDV amount is displayed&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.VerifyAndCalculateCarIdv.i_verify_idv_amount_is_displayed()&amp#27;[39m

testcase.name: Calculate Bike IDV and validate amount is displayed
testcase.classname: NV_US01_TC03 Two-Wheeler IDV via Bike Claim Settlement and verify amount

testcase.name: Verify HLV calculator page title is displayed
testcase.classname: NV_US01_TC04 Verify Human Life Value Calculator is navigated through Life Insurance
testcase.system-out: @NV_US01_TC04 &amp#27;[1mScenario:&amp#27;[22m Verify HLV calculator page title is displayed &amp#27;[90m# features/NV_US01_TC04_Verify_HLV_Calculator_Navigation.feature:4&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32mâœ”&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mGiven &amp#27;[22mI launch the browser and open InsuranceDekho application&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.VerifyCarInsuranceHeading.i_launch_the_browser_and_open_insurance_dekho_application()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32mâœ”&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22mI hover on Insurance menu&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.VerifyCarInsuranceHeading.i_hover_on_insurance_menu()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[33mâ– &amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[33m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mI hover on Life Insurance menu&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[36mâ†·&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[36m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mI click on Human Life Value Calculator&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[36mâ†·&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[36m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22mI verify HLV calculator page title is displayed&amp#27;[39m
